content: TechShield Managed Services, founded 2016 (9 years in business). We serve 42 active clients, including 11 healthcare providers and 3 hospital networks across the region.
24/7/365 helpdesk staffed in-house. SLA: 15-minute response for critical (P1) incidents, 1-hour for high (P2). 99.9% historical SLA attainment over the last 24 months.

We follow the HIPAA Security Rule: AES-256 encryption at rest and in transit, role-based access, annual risk assessments, signed BAAs, and quarterly staff HIPAA training. PHI is segmented on dedicated VLANs with continuous SIEM monitoring.

topic: backup disaster recovery rpo rto continuity
content: 3-2-1 backup strategy with immutable offsite copies. Standard targets: RPO 1 hour, RTO 4 hours. DR failover tested twice yearly with documented results.

topic: certifications compliance soc2 iso staff credentials
content: Company holds SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001:2022. Staff certifications include CISSP (x2), CompTIA Security+, Microsoft Azure Administrator, and HIPAA Certified Professional.
Reference A: Cedar Valley Clinic (38 staff) - contact on request. Reference B: Lakeside Pediatrics (25 staff) - contact on request.

Standard onboarding is a 30-day phased transition: discovery and audit (week 1), documentation and tooling deployment (weeks 2-3), and full handover with a go-live checklist (week 4). A dedicated transition manager is assigned throughout.

topic: pricing model per-user managed services cost
content: We price on a flat per-user, per-month managed services model with no long-term lock-in. Volume discounts apply above 50 seats. Onboarding is a one-time fee waived for annual contracts.
